root.sql:
select tb.* ,( total_int / loan_approve_amount * tax_reduce_amount ) as int_cal ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( begining_of_contract , 'SD' ) as begining_day ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( begining_of_contract , 'MONTH' ) as begining_month ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( begining_of_contract , 'YYYY' ) as begining_year , account_year + 543 as account_tyear from ( SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card)as id_card ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no) as memname ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ,sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount ) as loan_installment_amount_text
,sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name ,sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name ,pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard (sc_cnt_m_coop.taxid_coop)as taxid_coop ,'เลขที่ 334 หมู่ 16 ถนนอำนาจอนุสรณ์ ตำบลบุ่ง อ.เมือง จ.อำนาจเจริญ 37000 ' as coop_address /*ล๊อคไปแบบนี้เลย สหกรณ์ไม่เปลี่ยนที่อยู่หรอก*/ ,sc_cnt_m_coop.telephone_no
,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_line( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , '1' ) as address_line /*ที่อยู่ตามทะเบียนบ้าน*/
,PKB_REPYEAR.fp_loan_sum_int( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account , sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account ) as total_int /*ดอกเบี้ยรวม*/ ,case when sc_lon_req_coll_law_head.tax_reduce_amount > sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount then sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount else sc_lon_req_coll_law_head.tax_reduce_amount end as tax_reduce_amount
,sc_lon_req_coll_law_house.address_no ,sc_lon_req_coll_law_house.moo ,sc_lon_req_coll_law_house.soi ,sc_lon_req_coll_law_house.road ,sc_lon_req_coll_law_house.tambol ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_lon_req_coll_law_house.province_code , sc_lon_req_coll_law_house.district_code ) as district_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name ( sc_lon_req_coll_law_house.province_code ) as province_name
, sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate FROM sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_cnt_m_coop ,sc_acc_m_account_year ,sc_lon_req_coll_law_head ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_lon_req_coll_law_house WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = sc_lon_req_coll_law_head.doc_no and sc_lon_req_coll_law_house.doc_no = sc_lon_req_coll_law_head.doc_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0'
/*WHERE*/ --and sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year = 2021 --and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'พ58000397'
) tb
